What this is

This directory is documented by a single guide file, and that guide states one clear rule: this directory should not be in a parser-only regeneration plan.

Role in the whole repository

The directory serves the repository as a guarded documentation area: its content exists to communicate that it must be excluded from parser-only regeneration planning.

Composition

This is a leaf directory, so there are no child directories to describe here; the visible local content is the guide that sets the directory’s one explicit rule.

Seams and contracts

The load-bearing invariant is simple and sharp: parser-only regeneration must not include this directory.

Where it can hurt you

The hazard is accidental inclusion in a regeneration plan that only parses files, because the guide explicitly forbids that use of this directory.
